reviews.comment:
Me han atendido muy bien. Se quejan de la limpieza de los baños, yo digo: los baños están sucios porque la gente es SUCIA.

(Translated by Google)
I've been treated very well. People complain about the cleanliness of the bathrooms; I say: the bathrooms are dirty because people are DIRTY.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtODREYkV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Soy socio del ACA, fui el viernes, el sábado y el domingo, en horario de atención, (según su cartel) y SIEMPRE, estuco cerrado, el playero, gentilmente me invito a que valla al mercado de la Estación Puma de enfrente o a una ferretería. 🤦‍♂️
Terrible !!!
Ser socio del ACA, es "lo mejor del mundo" y me llama la atención que atiendan así. Me quejo de esta, pero amo al resto x su trato y servicio 🥰

(Translated by Google)
I'm an ACA member, and I went on Friday, Saturday, and Sunday during business hours (according to their sign), and EVERY TIME, the stucco shop was closed. The attendant politely suggested I go to the Puma gas station market across the street or to a hardware store. 🤦‍♂️
Terrible!!!
Being an ACA member is "the best thing in the world," and I'm shocked that they treat you like this. I'm complaining about this one place, but I love the rest for their treatment and service. 🥰

reviewReply.comment: Efectivamente estuvo cerrado un mes pues la tienda se transformó en Full.
